repository.name: NVAI Artist Video Library
repository.description: Dynamic video repository for artist rooms - landing screens, lead-in videos, inspiration sources, and location backdrops

landing.description: Renaissance workshop entrance with flying machines and anatomical studies

lead-in.description: A workshop awakens with golden light streaming through arched windows, revealing flying machines, anatomical drawings, and scientific instruments

inspirations.title: Human Anatomy
inspirations.description: Dissection, observation, understanding the body - Leonardo's obsessive study of human form

inspirations.title: Flight & Birds
inspirations.description: Ornithological observations and mechanical flying machines - centuries ahead of aviation

inspirations.title: Water & Hydraulics
inspirations.description: Flowing patterns, swirling dynamics, and hydraulic systems - nature's engineering

inspirations.title: Nature's Geometry
inspirations.description: Spirals, fractals, and mathematical proportions - the underlying harmony of creation

locations.title: Florence Workshop
locations.description: Leonardo's main studio in Florence - where he developed his revolutionary techniques

locations.title: Milan Court
locations.description: Ludovico Sforza's palace - where Leonardo served as court artist and engineer

locations.title: Rome & Vatican
locations.description: Later years in Rome - connections to Vatican and papal patronage

locations.title: Amboise, France
locations.description: Final refuge in Loire Valley - Leonardo's last sanctuary and legacy

landing.description: La Casa Azul entrance with deep blue walls, tropical plants, and intimate sanctuary

lead-in.description: La Casa Azul comes alive - deep blue walls, tropical light, pre-Columbian artifacts, and Frida's presence

inspirations.title: Pain & Suffering
inspirations.description: Physical and emotional pain transformed into art - Frida's unflinching self-examination

inspirations.title: Mexican Folk Art
inspirations.description: Indigenous textiles, traditional crafts, and cultural heritage - roots of identity

inspirations.title: Diego Rivera & Love
inspirations.description: Passionate relationship with Diego - muse, rival, betrayer, inspiration

inspirations.title: Jungle & Nature
inspirations.description: Tropical abundance, organic forms, and natural sensuality

locations.title: La Casa Azul

landing.purpose: Entry screen for each artist room

locations.purpose: Immersive backdrop of places artist visited/worked

rotationLogic.strategy: On each visit, randomly select one lead-in video and rotate through inspirations/locations
rotationLogic.caching: Cache selected videos for session to prevent jarring switches
rotationLogic.fallback: If video fails to load, display landing screen
